REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT ESTHER EAMES, LLC AMENDED MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS B AND C ARE THE ANSWER AND COMPLAINT FROM AN UNRELATED CASE. SAID EXHIBITS ARE THE SAME IN BOTH THE FILED MOTION AND THE COURTESY COPIES PROVIDED TO THE COURT. ON THE BASIS OF THE PROVIDED EXHIBITS, THE COURT FINDS THAT DEFENDANT DID NOT SHIFT ITS BURDEN WITH RESPECT TO TRIABLE ISSUES OF MATERIAL FACT. Off Calendar Jan-22-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT ESTHER EAMES, LLC AMENDED MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. Defendant's Exhibits B and C are the answer and complaint from an unrelated case. Said exhibits are the same in both the filed motion and the courtesy copies provided to the Court. On the basis of the provided exhibits, the Court finds that Defendant did not shift its burden with respect to triable issues of material fact. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Defendant Esther Eames, Llc'S Motion To Compel Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents (Set One) And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-09-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Benjamin Graves, Esq 415-453-3600 for Plaintiff through Court Call.
Matthew Volkmann, Esq. 415-394-6688 of Smith Currie for Defendant Esther Eames.

RULING - A R G U E D. the Court informs parties this should have been a housing case. Parties are given a copy of the Judge Pro Tem's report. The matter is recalled at 10:34 am. Both side argue. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Defendant Esther Eames, Llc'S Motion To Compel Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents (Set One) And For Monetary Sanctions.

Plaintiff needs to provide a verification of supplemental responses by 1/16/19 stating that thre are no responsive pleadings. Plaintiff is required to pay to Defedant's Counsel and Defendants, $675 in monetary sanctions to be paid within 30 days. Those sanctiosn are not against Counsel. (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript)

Mr. Volkmann to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/HK)
